item.title: RAYSEARCH LABORATORIES AB: RayCare 2024A SP1. Oncology Information Systems. Recall
item.summary: Beam set delivery note issues in which there is potential data loss if the beam set delivery note is modified simultaneously and/or if a note is updated during a treatment session, the user is not notified of the change. Product details: RayCare 2024A SP1. Oncology Information Systems.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
